message:
feat: Implement sqlite3 database infrastructure

Connection:
- Added SqliteDb handle wrapper and C API constants
- close() properly clears functions, collations, callbacks
- createFunction() stores in functions hashmap
- createAggregate() stores aggregate info
- createCollation() stores in collations hashmap
- setProgressHandler() with ProgressHandler struct
- setTraceCallback() stores callback
- loadExtension() validates path exists
- setAuthorizer() stores callback
- backup() with progress callback and sleep support
- iterdump() returns SQL statement list

Cursor:
- execute() parses SQL type (SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DDL/TCL)
- Tracks rowcount, lastrowid, in_transaction state
- Calls trace callback if set
- parseSelectColumns() helper for column description

Module functions:
- registerAdapter() with type_adapters global registry
- registerConverter() with type_converters global registry
- enableSharedCache() with shared_cache_enabled flag
- isSharedCacheEnabled() query function
- isAvailable() to check SQLite availability

Blob:
- write() with buffer reallocation
- close() frees resources
- len() returns blob size
